testCases.title: Verify login page loads with all required UI elements
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads at the specified URL and username_textbox, password_textbox, sign_in_button, home_navigation_button, and back_navigation_button are visible, enabled, and ready for user interaction.

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and the browser redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home where the home page UI is visible and the login page is no longer displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and invalid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, the user remains on the login page URL, and a visible error message indicating invalid or incorrect credentials is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the application stays on the login page URL, and a visible message indicating invalid or incorrect credentials is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are incorrect
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the application remains on the login page, and a visible invalid credentials error message is shown.

testCases.title: Verify login validation when username field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login request is not processed, the user remains on the login page, and a visible validation message indicates the username field is required.

testCases.title: Verify login validation when password field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login request is blocked, the login page remains displayed, and a visible validation message indicates the password field is required.

testCases.title: Verify login validation when both username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login submission is prevented and validation messages indicate that both username and password fields are required while the login page remains visible.

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Characters typed into password_textbox are displayed as masked characters such as dots or asterisks and the actual password text is not visible.

testCases.title: Verify home navigation button redirects to home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page UI becomes visible in the browser.

testCases.title: Verify back navigation button redirects to home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page at http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username contains only whitespace
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, the login page remains visible, and a validation or error message indicates the username input is invalid or empty.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password contains only whitespace
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication attempt fails, the login page remains displayed, and a visible validation or authentication failure message appears.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with leading and trailing spaces in username
testCases.expectedResult: System processes the input and either trims whitespace allowing successful authentication and redirection to the home page, or rejects the login with an invalid credentials message while staying on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with very long username input
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding normal username length into username_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application remains stable without UI errors, authentication is rejected, and the user remains on the login page with an invalid credentials or validation message.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with very long password input
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding normal password length into password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: System handles the long input without UI failure, authentication is rejected, and the login page remains visible with an invalid credentials message.

testCases.title: Verify multiple rapid clicks on Sign In button with valid credentials
testCases.expectedResult: Only a single authentication request is processed and the user is redirected once to the home page without duplicate navigation, multiple sessions, or UI errors.

testCases.title: Verify login using copy and paste credentials
steps: Copy hacklarr and paste it into username_textbox
Copy Icstunnel1 and paste it into password_textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Credentials pasted into the fields are accepted and authentication succeeds, redirecting the user to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key
testCases.expectedResult: The login form is submitted using the Enter key and successful authentication redirects the user to the home page URL.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with special characters in username
testCases.expectedResult: Application remains stable, authentication fails, and an invalid credentials message is displayed while the login page remains visible.
